auth_email_unconfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox for the welcome message.
auth_forgot_password_sent: If an account exists, we sent instructions by email.
auth_password_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth_login_locked: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please wait and try again.
auth_account_blocked: Your account has been blocked for security reasons. Please contact IT.
auth_account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact IT.
auth_session_invalid: Invalid or ended session. Please sign in again.
forbidden_platform_admin_only: Only platform administrators can perform this action.
org_forbidden: You do not have access to this organization.
insufficient_scope: You do not have permission for this action.
org_only_platform_members_in_org: Only platform members can belong to an organization.
org_user_already_in_organization: This user is already assigned to an organization.
org_default_role_missing: Organization default role is missing. Contact support.
org_role_name_taken: A role with this name already exists in the organization.
org_role_in_use: Cannot delete this role because it is assigned to members.
org_role_default_protected: Cannot delete the organization default role.
company_cnpj_taken: A company with this CNPJ already exists in the organization.
company_slug_taken: A company with this slug already exists in the organization.
certificate_upload_error: Could not upload the digital certificate.
key_vault_error: Certificate storage is not configured or is unavailable.
nfe_xml_invalid: Invalid or unsupported NFe XML file.
nfe_xml_company_not_found: No organization company matches the document CNPJ/CPF.
nfe_document_duplicate: This access key has already been imported.
nfe_inbound_process_not_found: Inbound process not found for this document.
nfe_inbound_invalid_transition: Inbound status transition is not allowed.
